title: BIO 2026: Cell and gene therapy sector must break the mold to thrive
snippet: If cell and gene therapy makers are going to achieve their mission to improve patients’ lives, the industry must come together to share information across stakeholders, from regulators to manufacturers to payers.

title: Genomic Landscape of Oral Squamous Cell Carcinoma in Never Smokers and Never Drinkers.
publicationName: Asian Pacific journal of cancer prevention : APJCP
journalName: Asian Pacific journal of cancer prevention : APJCP
snippet: To identify the mutational landscape of oral cancers of unknown etiology by leveraging publicly available datasets. Oral cancer mutation data in TCGA were accessed to identify never-smoking and never-alcohol-drinking subjects with genomic, epigenomic, and transcriptomic data. Habit-free participants within published individual whole-exome sequencing studies...
